votes.rationale: The draft command creates a structurally correct 9-file motion package from deterministic templates. Structural files (policy.yaml, decision.yaml, vote.json, verify.json) are populated from governance config. Narrative files are clearly marked placeholder scaffolds. The scaffold-only reminder prints after every run. No API called, no files written outside the motion directory, intent required.

The draft command correctly separates deterministic scaffolding from model-generated narrative. The collision guard targets the next unused motion ID, which naturally avoids overwrites. Placeholder markers are consistent and visually obvious. The command is a single addition to the existing motion-factory.mjs script with no new dependencies or config surfaces.

Motion Factory v0 now has two proven commands: context (inspectable context gathering) and draft (deterministic package scaffold). The structural foundation is ready for model-assisted narrative generation in a future motion. The factory remains bounded, human-intent-gated, and DRAFT-only.
